topic: Tax documents arrive
agenda: Tax documents arrive (W-2 from Lionsgate Partners, adjunct pay summary from Montgomery College). Ian books the H&R Block appointment for the spring filing.

topic: Annual physical with Dr. Amara Osei, timed near Ian's birthday
agenda: Annual physical with Dr. Amara Osei, timed near Ian's birthday. Iron recheck and anxiety med review.

topic: Ian's birthday
agenda: Ian's birthday. Quiet dinner at home, the kids usually bake.

topic: Lucy's birthday
agenda: Lucy's birthday. Friends over for cake, art-themed party most years.

topic: Anne's birthday
agenda: Anne's birthday. Family dinner at Ian's place or Anne's place in Falls Church.

topic: Heritage Month celebration at St. Camillus, planning committee event
agenda: (Monday) Heritage Month celebration at St. Camillus, planning committee event. Ian on setup.

topic: Anne's 37th birthday
agenda: (Thursday) Anne's 37th birthday. Family dinner at Anne's in Falls Church.

topic: 00 AM
agenda: (Sunday) All Saints Day Mass at St. Camillus, 11:00 AM. Choir singing.

topic: All Souls observance
agenda: (Monday) All Souls observance. Family altar at home. Evening Mass at St. Camillus.

topic: 00 PM at St. Camillus
agenda: (Thursday) Christmas Eve Mass, 9:00 PM at St. Camillus.

topic: Christmas Day Morning at home, gifts after coffee
agenda: (Friday) Christmas Day Morning at home, gifts after coffee. Late lunch with Anne.

topic: Yvette's 41st birthday
agenda: (Monday) Yvette's 41st birthday. Coffee before ESOL.

topic: Annual physical with Dr. Amara Osei
agenda: (Tuesday) Annual physical with Dr. Amara Osei. Iron levels recheck and anxiety med review.

topic: PSLF employment certification due
agenda: (Friday) PSLF employment certification due (annual submission for student-loan forgiveness eligibility).

topic: Lucy's 11th birthday
agenda: (Friday) Lucy's 11th birthday. Art-themed party with Mei and a few friends.
